## Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] New Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactoring / Code Cleanup (`refactor`)

## Author's Checklist
- [ ] The code compiles locally without errors or warnings (`make`).
- [ ] There are no apparent memory leaks in the added logic.
- [ ] The C++98 standard rules were respected (including the Orthodox Canonical Form for new classes).
- [ ] I added inline comments (`//`) to sensitive parts of the code to facilitate review.

## Notes for the Reviewer
